title: 1 step DFU - Content of Software Update tab with Earbuds on latest FW and Charge Case on FW 5038
scenario: Software Update tab shows "Up to date" when Voyager Free 60+ earbuds are on latest firmware and Charge Case is on firmware 5038 (non-1-step DFU)
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Ensure the Poly Voyager Free 60+ earbuds are connected and on the latest firmware.
Ensure the Charge Case is on firmware 5038 (which does not support 1-step DFU).
Locate and tap the Software Update tab/section.
Observe the status displayed on the Software Update tab.
expected: The Software Update tab shows "Up to date".
